mapper.select:
/* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnouncementMapper.selectAnnouncementList */ /* 공고 목록 조회 */
SELECT cap.ann_no AS annNo , cap.board_no AS boardNo , cbi.board_nm AS boardNm , cbi.board_ty_cd AS boardTyCd , cbi.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo , ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm , cap.ttl AS ttl , cap.cn AS cn , cap.wrtr_id AS wrtrId , cap.top_fix_yn AS topFixYn , TO_CHAR(cap.pblanc_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS pblancBgngDt , TO_CHAR(cap.pblanc_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS pblancEndDt , TO_CHAR(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rcrtBgngDt , TO_CHAR(cap.rcrt_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rcrtEndDt , TO_CHAR(cap.reg_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDttm , TO_CHAR(cap.mdf_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS mdfDttm , NVL(cap.inq_cnt, 0) AS inqCnt , NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') AS delYn , NVL(cap.opn_yn, 'Y') AS opnYn , cap.sbmsn_doc AS sbmsnDoc , ( SELECT LISTAGG(NVL(cc.code_name, doc.doc_cd), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY doc.doc_ord) FROM ( SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) AS doc_cd , lv.lvl AS doc_ord FROM ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 20 ) lv WHERE lv.lvl <= REGEXP_COUNT(NVL(cap.sbmsn_doc, ','), ',') + 1 AND TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) IS NOT NULL ) doc LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_no_cd = doc.doc_cd AND cc.group_code_no = 'SUBMIT_DOC_TY' ) AS sbmsnDocNm , cap.atch_file_id AS atchFileId , ac.dorojuso
, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = cbi.apt_cmplex_no AND rl.ann_no = cap.ann_no ), 0) || '세대' supplyDisplay
, CASE WHEN cap.atch_file_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END hasFileYn , CASE WHEN cap.rcrt_bgng_dt IS NULL OR cap.rcrt_end_dt IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) < TRUNC(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt) THEN '예정' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(cap.rcrt_end_dt) THEN '마감' ELSE '진행중' END AS statusNm
FROM center_ann_board_post cap INNER JOIN center_board_instance cbi ON cap.board_no = cbi.board_no LEFT JOIN apt_complex ac ON cbi.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE 1 = 1 AND NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND LOWER(cap.ttl) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchTtl}) || '%'
AND cbi.apt_cmplex_no = #{searchAptCmplexNo}
AND cap.rcrt_bgng_dt >= TO_DATE(#{searchFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND cap.rcrt_end_dt <= TO_DATE(#{searchTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CASE WHEN cap.rcrt_bgng_dt IS NULL OR cap.rcrt_end_dt IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) < TRUNC(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt) THEN '예정' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(cap.rcrt_end_dt) THEN '마감' ELSE '진행중' END = #{searchStatus}
ORDER BY cap.reg_dttm DESC

/* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnouncementMapper.selectAnnouncement */ /* 공고 상세 조회 */
SELECT cap.ann_no AS annNo , cap.board_no AS boardNo , cbi.board_nm AS boardNm , cbi.board_ty_cd AS boardTyCd , cbi.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo , ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm , cap.ttl AS ttl , cap.cn AS cn , cap.wrtr_id AS wrtrId , cap.top_fix_yn AS topFixYn , TO_CHAR(cap.pblanc_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS pblancBgngDt , TO_CHAR(cap.pblanc_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS pblancEndDt , TO_CHAR(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rcrtBgngDt , TO_CHAR(cap.rcrt_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rcrtEndDt , TO_CHAR(cap.reg_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDttm , TO_CHAR(cap.mdf_dttm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS mdfDttm , NVL(cap.inq_cnt, 0) AS inqCnt , NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') AS delYn , NVL(cap.opn_yn, 'Y') AS opnYn , cap.sbmsn_doc AS sbmsnDoc , ( SELECT LISTAGG(NVL(cc.code_name, doc.doc_cd), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY doc.doc_ord) FROM ( SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) AS doc_cd , lv.lvl AS doc_ord FROM ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 20 ) lv WHERE lv.lvl <= REGEXP_COUNT(NVL(cap.sbmsn_doc, ','), ',') + 1 AND TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(cap.sbmsn_doc, '[^,]+', 1, lv.lvl)) IS NOT NULL ) doc LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code_no_cd = doc.doc_cd AND cc.group_code_no = 'SUBMIT_DOC_TY' ) AS sbmsnDocNm , cap.atch_file_id AS atchFileId , ac.dorojuso
, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = cbi.apt_cmplex_no AND rl.ann_no = cap.ann_no ), 0) || '세대' supplyDisplay
, CASE WHEN cap.atch_file_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END hasFileYn , CASE WHEN cap.rcrt_bgng_dt IS NULL OR cap.rcrt_end_dt IS NULL THEN '-' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) < TRUNC(cap.rcrt_bgng_dt) THEN '예정' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(cap.rcrt_end_dt) THEN '마감' ELSE '진행중' END AS statusNm
FROM center_ann_board_post cap INNER JOIN center_board_instance cbi ON cap.board_no = cbi.board_no LEFT JOIN apt_complex ac ON cbi.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE cap.ann_no = #{annNo} AND NVL(cap.del_yn, 'N') = 'N'

/* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnouncementMapper.selectAptComplexList */ /* 단지 목록 조회 */
SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo , ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm , ac.dorojuso AS dorojuso , NVL(( SELECT SUM(NVL(au.unit_cnt, 0)) FROM apt_unit au WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no ), NVL(ac.unit_cnt, 0)) AS unitCnt FROM apt_complex ac WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM center_board_instance cbi WHERE cbi.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no AND NVL(cbi.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' ) ORDER BY ac.apt_cmplex_nm

/* 단지 상세정보 조회 */
SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo , ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm , ac.dorojuso AS dorojuso , NVL(( SELECT SUM(NVL(au.unit_cnt, 0)) FROM apt_unit au WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no ), 0) AS unitCnt FROM apt_complex ac WHERE ac.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
